## Affected Files

- `path/to/file.py` - What should be changed.
- `tests/test_*.py` - What should be confirmed stays stable.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code is simplified.
- [ ] Public behavior is unchanged.
- [ ] Tests pass unchanged or improve.
- [ ] Docs are updated if user-facing behavior changed.

## Success Metrics

- The code path is easier to reason about.
- The diff is smaller or clearer than the original implementation.
- No regression in behavior or performance.

## Validation / Testing

- [ ] Run the targeted tests for the refactored path.
- [ ] Run the repository validation gate.
- [ ] Confirm no behavior change is introduced.
